title: Earlier Host-Workflow And Workspace-Authority Gate History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency host-workflow and workspace-authority publication gates so those records no longer read like live parent-root publication guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 180, the smallest remaining earlier 2026-05-06 gate branch is the host-workflow and workspace-authority family: the publication gates for host bootstrap/status authority, workspace-authority consolidation, and the later dormancy decision. Those records preserve already-closed branch evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live parent-root publication and host-resync guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the three targeted Olares Dev Residency gate handoffs as historical host-workflow/workspace-authority publication records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the three targeted Olares Dev Residency gate packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the detailed publication, host-resync, and old-clone observation evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical bridge records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
roadmap or PM-cockpit gate normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted host-workflow/workspace-authority handoff now leads as a historical gate record instead of live parent-root publication guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live gate definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves the roadmap/PM-cockpit family separate if still untouched.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-064-packet-062-and-packet-063-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-067-packet-065-and-packet-066-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-072-packet-071-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Execute Packet 182 as the remaining earlier roadmap and PM-cockpit gate-history slice, then reassess whether any smaller earlier 2026-05-06 residue still remains current-looking.
